tools.name: create_cpp_class
tools.description: Create a new C++ class with header and implementation files. Validates code safety before writing. WARNING: If the header contains UCLASS/USTRUCT macros, Live Coding cannot compile it — editor restart required.

header_code.description: Full content of the .h file including #pragma once, includes, UCLASS macro

auto_compile.description: Trigger Live Coding after writing. Only works for .cpp-only changes.

tools.name: modify_cpp_file
tools.description: Modify an existing C++ source file. The entire file content must be provided.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the .h or .cpp file

content.description: Full new content of the file

tools.name: trigger_compile
tools.description: Trigger Live Coding compilation. Only works for .cpp implementation changes, not structural header changes.

tools.name: regenerate_project_files
tools.description: Regenerate Visual Studio/Rider project files after adding new source files.
